prediction.reasoning: Using a geometric Brownian motion model with historical volatility estimates for financial stocks. Assumed annual volatility of ~25% typical for large financial institutions. For 18-day horizon, applied daily volatility of ~1.57%. Point estimate assumes no drift (random walk). Confidence intervals based on log-normal distribution: 50% CI covers ±0.67 standard deviations, 80% CI covers ±1.28 standard deviations, 90% CI covers ±1.64 standard deviations of the price distribution.
